dataProvenance.optimalTemp: Theisen et al. 2012 (N Atlantic PSAT, >90% in 17.5–27.5°C) + Sepulveda et al. 2011: https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s00227-012-2010-x
dataProvenance.toleratedTemp: Sepulveda et al. 2011 (Marine Biology) observed range 10–30°C: https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s00227-010-1618-y
dataProvenance.depthPreference: Theisen et al. 2012 (>90% of time above 200m, median 30m night / 51m day): https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s00227-012-2010-x
dataProvenance.lunarSensitivity: unverified — captain wisdom of full-moon peak not supported by peer-reviewed CPUE
dataProvenance.timeOfDayPreferences: Theisen et al. 2012 — diel vertical migration (interpolated weights): https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s00227-012-2010-x
dataProvenance.structurePreferences: NOAA + Florida Museum: drop-offs, ledges, pinnacles, banks, current edges, sargassum (pinnacles/banks → ledge, color/thermal/current edges → ripCurrent, sargassum/floating debris → weedLine): https://www.fisheries.noaa.gov/species/atlantic-wahoo
dataProvenance.weeklyPresenceCurve: NOAA SAFMC FMP + Bermuda seasonality (Oxenford et al.) — Atlantic-coast-weighted, not peer-reviewed FL CPUE: https://www.fisheries.noaa.gov/species/atlantic-wahoo
